creator: alterego@pisig.cx
text:
I was using a PPP conection on my system, using KPPP under KDE.  However, If i ever powered down the modem while system was up (but NOT the PPP link) the system would reset.  Please remidy this problem so that I may feel comfortable using FreeBSD again.
Thank you,
Mick Benoit

How-To-Repeat: Hook up a USR 28.8 Sportster and turn it off while the system is running.
